# Fixture: allison_magallanes_stop
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 10.5s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Allison! Welcome to Shiftsmart. Ready to get started? Your next step is to complete your orientation in the app — reply here if you have any questions!
Partner: Stop

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You have been unsubscribed from Shiftsmart messages. If you have questions for me, you can text START to this number at any time.
